message:
refactor(core): hoist import, use method reference, and simplify decrement_owner

Three small code quality improvements:

extensions.rs:
- Move `use std::io::Read` from function-local scope inside fs_op_read()
  to the module-level import block where it belongs, and remove the
  now-redundant local import in HashlineEditTool::execute()
- This consolidates the import so both fs_op_read() and hashline_edit
  share the same module-level import

hostcall_amac.rs:
- Replace `.fold(0u64, |acc, val| acc.saturating_add(val))` closure with
  the equivalent method reference `.fold(0u64, u64::saturating_add)` in
  the variance computation, which is more idiomatic and avoids an
  unnecessary closure allocation

hostcall_s3_fifo.rs:
- Simplify decrement_owner() by replacing the if-let/else pattern with
  `.is_some_and()` which makes the intent clearer: compute should_remove
  in a single expression rather than branching between the Some and None
  cases separately

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
